item.title: Glimpses of a Vim configuration
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
It's been a while since I startôÙed trackôÙing verôÙsions of my cusôÙtom Vim conôÙfigôÙuôÙraôÙtion, and makôÙing it availôÙable as an open source softôÙware in Github. The best of this project is, in my opinôÙion, to have it unôÙder verôÙsion conôÙtrol, so I can track changes and reôÙleasôÙes.

EvôÙery once in a while, when I find a new setôÙting, or a great new feaôÙture, I modôÙiôÙfy the conôÙfigôÙuôÙraôÙtion, so they will beôÙcome availôÙable on the next reôÙlease. BeôÙsides the feaôÙtures that are menôÙtioned in the proôÙjecôÙt, and the cusôÙtomizaôÙtions made, I feel very comôÙfortôÙable with the colour scheme I made.

Here are some glimpses of it:

First capôÙture of colours, and layôÙout

The colour scheme is genôÙerôÙal for the synôÙtax highôÙlightôÙing of all types recôÙogôÙnized by Vim. Please note this might alôÙso deôÙpend on the conôÙfigôÙuôÙraôÙtion of your terôÙmiôÙnal.

The tabs are alôÙso themed acôÙcordôÙing to the menus.

Any sugôÙgesôÙtions or imôÙproveôÙments to the code and conôÙfigôÙuôÙraôÙtion can be made on the Github projecôÙt.

item.title: Alpine email client
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
Alpine is a softôÙware I defôÙiôÙniteôÙly recôÙomôÙmend for those who like minôÙiôÙmalôÙisôÙtic apôÙpliôÙcaôÙtionôÙs that go straight to the point in orôÙder to get the things done. It's an email clienôÙt, with no GUI, which alôÙlows me to read emails betôÙter than by means of the web page [1] withôÙout any disôÙtracôÙtionôÙs, foôÙcusôÙing on what is just imôÙporôÙtanôÙt. It is alôÙso great that shows onôÙly the text (the relôÙeôÙvant part of the email) and it can folôÙlow the links by launchôÙing the deôÙfault browsôÙer.

It is simôÙple, fast and perôÙfectôÙly suitôÙable for checkôÙing my old inôÙbox with weekôÙly lists upôÙdates. It's inôÙherôÙitôÙed from an old proôÙjecôÙt, called pine, and in FeôÙdoôÙra it can be inôÙstalled by:

sudo dnf install alpine

Then you just need to conôÙfigôÙure the email acôÙcount setôÙtings (one last time to visôÙit the page, but that would be the last :-) and you're ready.

[1]Not for gmail but from another older account I have

item.title: Presentations with reveal.js
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya / @rmarianoa
item.description:
Old-ôÙfashôÙioned PPôÙT's preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtions are from the 90's, and let's face it, we are in the age of the web browsôÙer. So, the last time I had to gave a talk, I deôÙcidôÙed to use a betôÙter techôÙniôÙcal supôÙport.

AfôÙter a quick search for alôÙterôÙnaôÙtives, I found many opôÙtionôÙs, inôÙcludôÙing well-ôÙknown liôÙbraries, unôÙtil I fiôÙnalôÙly deôÙcidôÙed for reôÙveal.js.

It is writôÙten in JavaScript with good CSS themes, and it does not reôÙquire exôÙpert knowlôÙedge on those techôÙnoloôÙgies. In orôÙder to play the preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion, you launch an HTML file from a web browsôÙer or yôÙou can alôÙso run it with a statôÙic servôÙer.

AdôÙvanôÙtages:

  • VerôÙsion conôÙtrol: GivôÙen the fact that your preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion is made from source code, it is posôÙsiôÙble ôÙto track changes by usôÙing git.
  • A betôÙter cross-ôÙplatôÙform supôÙport: it does not reôÙly on a parôÙticôÙuôÙlar softôÙware in a parôÙticôÙuôÙlar verôÙsion to be present (web browsers are ubiqôÙuiôÙtous nowaôÙdays).
  • ComôÙpatôÙiôÙbilôÙiôÙty: WYSIôÙWYG.
  • Able to host your preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion in the cloud and acôÙcess it from anyôÙwhere.

ReaôÙsons to use it / nice things about it:

  • We are in 2014
  • SupôÙports MarkôÙdown lanôÙguage

To be clear: I am not sayôÙing that this is a betôÙter alôÙterôÙnaôÙtive beôÙcause is newôÙer of modôÙern, but beôÙcause of the adôÙvanôÙtages listôÙed. In othôÙer wordôÙs, if we count with deôÙvelôÙoped toolôÙs at our disôÙposôÙal, it would be a good idea to use them.

Here are some simôÙple and baôÙsic exôÙamôÙples of preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtions I am workôÙing on. (DISôÙCLAIMER: they might be in difôÙferôÙent lanôÙguages, and the page is in proôÙgress).
